attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\GameState\\\\UnshowPrepareState.ts\",\"content\":\"\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理RespinGame\\n     */\\n    /**@ch ⚠️ BC-8 待實測：unshow Respin 恢復暫改「從 plate 0 重播整局」由 ENTER_RESPIN 重建鎖定，\\n     * 此方法目前無呼叫者。待 Respin 上線後確認 unshow 是否需在 prepare 階段直接鎖列亮燈，\\n     * 屆時恢復呼叫或刪除。 */\\n    private HandleRespinGame()\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"HandleRespinGame\\\" );\\n\\n        // 設定Respin鎖定列的旋轉鎖定\\n        Game_Define.RespinLockColumns.forEach( column => {\\n            this.m_gameView.SlotReels.SetColumnLock( column, true );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // 設定轉輪亮燈一次\\n        eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_UI_EVENT.SHOW_LIGHT_LEFT_REEL);\\n        eventManager.Dispatch(REEL_UI_EVENT.SHOW_LIGHT_RIGHT_REEL);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 恢復背景音樂\\n     */\\n    private RestoreBgm()\\n    {\\n        this.m_gameView.PlayMainGameBgm();\\n        if (this.m_gameView.IsFreeGame) {\\n            this.m_gameView.PauseMainGameBgm();\\n            this.m_gameView.PlayFreeGameBgm();\",\"numLines\":30,\"startLine\":240,\"totalLines\":272}}"</outcome>

GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n        if (!commonGameManager.HasUnshow) {\\n            log(\\\"[UnshowPrepareState] No unshow data, skip this state\\\");\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        log(\\\"OnEnter State: UnshowPrepare\\\");\\n        newExtraManager.HasUnshow = false;\\n\\n        newBottombarManager.SetBarNodeVisiable(true);\\n        if (this.m_gameView.GameIntro) {\\n            this.m_gameView.GameIntro.node.active = false;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_unshowSpinAckQue = this.m_gameView.UnshowSpinAck?.RoundQueue ?? [];\\n        this.m_startRound = Math.trunc(commonGameManager.UnshowStartRound ?? 0);\\n        if (this.m_unshowSpinAckQue.length > 0) {\\n            const lastIndex = this.m_unshowSpinAckQue.length - 1;\\n            if (this.m_startRound < 0 || this.m_startRound > lastIndex) {\\n                error(`[UnshowPrepareState] startRound (${this.m_startRound}) out of range [0, ${lastIndex}]`);\\n                this.m_startRound = Math.min(Math.max(0, this.m_startRound), lastIndex);\\n            }\\n            this.m_gameView.SetUnshowPlateCursor( this.m_startRound );\\n            this.m_startRoundInfo = this.m_unshowSpinAckQue[this.m_startRound];\\n        }\\n        else {\\n            error(\\\"[UnshowPrepareState] RoundQueue is empty\\\");\\n            this.m_startRound = 0;\\n            this.m_gameView.SetUnshowPlateCursor( 0 );\\n            this.m_startRoundInfo = null;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_previousAccumulatedWinValue = 0;\\n\\n        // 檢查是否為FreeGame 或 RespinGame\\n        if (\\n            this.m_unshowSpinAckQue.length > 1\\n            && this.m_startRound >= 1\\n            && this.m_startRound < this.m_unshowSpinAckQue.length\\n        ) {\\n            let plateSymbol = this.m_startRoundInfo?.PlateQueue?.[0]?.PlateSymbol ?? [];\\n            }\\n            // 原 else（CurrFeverGameType===RespinGame）為不可達死碼已刪：\\n            //   startRound≥1 ⟹ 必在 FreeGame（MG 僅 round 0），CurrFeverGameType 不會是 respin。\\n            //   Respin 0; i < this.m_startRound; i++) {\\n                this.m_previousAccumulatedWinValue += this.m_unshowSpinAckQue[i].RoundWin;\\n            }\\n\\n            // 設定起始盤面即上一手盤面\\n            this.m_gameView.SlotReels.SetPlateSymbolForUnshow(plateSymbol);\\n\\n            // 原 if(IsRespinGame) HandleRespinGame()：unshow 不再以 Respin 身分恢復（改 plate 0 重播），\\n            // 此處不再呼叫；HandleRespinGame From: `import Game_Define, { FeverGameType } from "../Game_Define";`

stateManager.NextState(CommonState.SPIN);\\n            }\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n        this.m_startRoundInfo = null;\\n content.text:
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Deleted Orphaned HandleRespinGame Method</title>
  <subtitle>Removed entire HandleRespinGame method with no active callers, completing cleanup of deprecated Respin unshow recovery code</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Deleted HandleRespinGame private method spanning lines 240-259 with 20 lines removed</fact>
    <fact>Method had BC-8 warning indicating no current callers and pending deletion decision after testing</fact>
    <fact>Method contained column locking logic using Game_Define.RespinLockColumns and reel lighting using REEL_UI_EVENT</fact>
    <fact>Removal completes cleanup chain: Game_Define default import removed, REEL_UI_EVENT import removed, now method itself deleted</fact>
    <fact>Unshow Respin recovery now exclusively uses plate 0 replay with ENTER_RESPIN state rebuilding locks naturally</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session deleted the entire HandleRespinGame method from UnshowPrepareState.ts, completing the refactor to remove deprecated Respin unshow recovery code. This method was marked BC-8 for testing but had no active callers after the architectural change to handle Respin disconnection recovery by replaying from plate 0 and letting the ENTER_RESPIN state transition naturally rebuild column locks. The deletion removes 20 lines including the method's column locking logic (Game_Define.RespinLockColumns.forEach) and reel lighting dispatches (REEL_UI_EVENT.SHOW_LIGHT_LEFT_REEL/RIGHT_REEL). This completes the three-step cleanup: first removing the Game_Define default import, then REEL_UI_EVENT import, and finally the method itself. The codebase now exclusively relies on the new replay-based recovery mechanism.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>assets/Script/GameState/UnshowPrepareState.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

ROUND_END）**；plate 用盡才 ROUND_END | 用戶拍板（AskUserQuestion：復用主鏈 + sub-index 短路） |\\n| BLOCKER-1 ReqRoundEnd | 🔴 硬阻斷（每手重複送終局訊號） | **解除**：plate 循環不碰 ROUND_END → 每 RoundInfo 送一次；剩 framework 放行條件實作前驗證 | 骨架推導 |\\n| BLOCKER-2 贏分口徑 | 🔴 硬阻斷（RoundWin 口徑未知） | **解除**：proto參數說明 RoundWin=round 總贏分 → mid-respin 用 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加；數值關係待對拍 | proto參數說明 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. **消滅旗標可寫狀態**：`IsGoingToFree` / `IsGoingToRespinGame` 由「散落賦值的可寫欄位」改為「協議資料的唯讀 getter 投影」，single source of truth = server 回包，消滅「在哪設 / 在哪清」。\\n2. **索引拆雙層**：`CurPlateIndex`（局索引，索引 RoundQueue）+ 新增 `CurSubPlateIndex`（局內 plate 索引，索引 PlateQueue），推進收斂為單一受控方法。\\n3. **狀態機 plate 內循環**：含 Respin 的 RoundInfo 在內部循環播完所有 plate（繞過 ROUND_END），只在 plate 用盡時進一次 ROUND_END（= RoundInfo 級，ReqRoundEnd 一次）。\\n4. **Respin 接通新協議**：鎖定改讀 server `PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos` 累加 + CheckState 優先序重排 + LeaveRespinState 補 ENTER_FREE 出口 + 刪死碼。\\n5. **支援連鎖 Respin 與「MG 局 Respin 完才進 FG」**：現有流程兩者都走錯（v1 對抗審查對碼證實）。\\n\\n### 1.1 範圍邊界（need given，不可越）\\n\\n不動 proto、不動 FeatureWheel 演出本體、不動 EnterFreeState/LeaveFreeState 演出、不順手清無關死碼。FeatureWheel→Respin 正式接線（誰消費 WheelFeatures）目前不存在（🟢A grep WheelFeatures=2 hits 無流程消費者），**不在本次範圍**——本重構讓 client 具備消化「server 多 plate 回包」的能力。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 骨架：狀態機流程（v2 核心）\\n\\n### 2.1 一手生命週期（既有，🟢A 已驗證）\\n\\n```\\nSPIN(plate) → EFFECT_START → SCATTER_SHOW → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → COMMON_SHOW → CHECK_STATE → {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 ROUND_END）────────────┐\\n                    ↓                                                          │\\nSPIN(plate k) → … → CHECK_STATE                                               │\\n                    ├ ① IsGoingToRespinGame（還有 plate, sub<len-1）           │\\n                    │     → ENTER_RESPIN（首手:設旗標+鎖col0/5+宣告; 累加鎖定）→ SPIN(plate k+1) ┘\\n                    ├ ② IsRespinGame（plate 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 設計前提與證據分級\\n\\n### 3.1 協議前提\\n\\n| 為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(round: number, roundQueueLen: number, isFreeGame: boolean): boolean\\n/** IsGoingToRespinGame 投影：sub < plateCount-1（plateCount≤0/缺值恆 false） */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 `warnings`（呼叫端 console.warn），跳過該筆，**不 throw 不靜默**。\\n- v1 的 `ScanRespinLockedPositions`（掃 Cash/Mystery）**移除**——位置改由 server 給定（§0）。\\n- 對應測試：`tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts`，遵循 A-14 ts-node 慣例。\\n\\n### 5.2 【修改】GameView.ts\\n\\n1. **旗標 getter 化**（刪 m_isGoingToFree/m_isGoingToRespinGame 欄位與 setter，:494-519）：\\n   ```ts\\n   public get IsGoingToFree(): boolean {\\n       return   <facts>

    <fact>P-3 clarifies RespinLockedPos in PlateInfo represents incremental locked positions added per plate, col 1-4 only</fact>
    <fact>P-4 confirms columns 0 and 5 are locked for entire Respin round per Game_Define.RespinLockColumns=[0,5]</fact>
    <fact>P-5 establishes RoundInfo.RoundWin equals sum of all PlateInfo.Win values in that round</fact>
    <fact>P-6 notes NextFeverGameType enum values 0,1 with user confirmation, proto documentation wording has ambiguity</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session reviewed protocol specification documentation in .claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md to understand the server data structure for implementing the Respin → FeatureWheel → FreeGame flow. The spec clarifies critical relationships: RoundQueue length indicates FreeGame triggers, PlateQueue length indicates Respin within a round, and RespinLockedPos provides incremental locking positions per plate. This research establishes foundational knowledge of how the server represents multi-plate rounds (Respin) versus multi-round sequences (FreeGame), which is essential for correctly implementing the state machine transitions when the new server data in respin_and_freegame.json triggers both features sequentially.</narrative>

{決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 B-4：server unshow 回包指回 Respin 局時是否含完整 PlateQueue——無碼上證據，待實測（BC-8）。\\n\\n### 3.4 ⚠️ 事實不一致標註（#003/#004 紀律）\\n\\n`NextFeverGameType` 值域：用戶口頭「只 0/1」 vs proto參數說明「進 FG/Respin」（CurrFeverGameType 列 0/1/2/3）。**影響評估**：新設計 Respin 改用 `PlateQueue.length` 結構判斷，完全不讀 NextFeverGameType；舊 RespinGame/RespinInFreeGame 判斷分支正是要刪的死碼。即使 server 偶送 NextFeverGameType=2，新流程正確性不受影響，僅「刪死碼是否遺漏依賴」需 grep 確認（BC-4 涵蓋）。∴ 標註不擋進度，但**不得在規格裡把「NextFeverGameType 恆 0/1」當 🟢A 事實**。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 實作前驗證點（v1 兩個 BLOCKER 已降級）+ 前置步驟\\n\\n### 前置步驟（第一個 commit 之前）\\n\\n1. **commit 現有 working tree**：git status 8 檔 M + 2 未追蹤 png，先 plate、MG 觸 FG、MG Respin×2 後進 FG、FG 局內 Respin、FG 結束。\\n- **BC-2 [testable]** 雙層推進軌跡：RoundQueue 形狀 `[{plates:3},{plates:1},{plates:2}]` 自 (-1,0) 連續 Advance = mid-respin 用 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加；數值關係待對拍 | proto參數說明 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. **消滅旗標可寫狀態**：`IsGoingToFree` / `IsGoingToRespinGame` 由「散落賦值的可寫欄位」改為「協議資料的唯讀 getter 投影」，single source of truth = server 回包，消滅「在哪設 / 在哪清」。\\n2. **索引拆雙層**：`CurPlateIndex`（局索引，索引 RoundQueue）+ 新增 `CurSubPlateIndex`（局內 plate 索引，索引 PlateQueue），推進收斂為單一受控方法。\\n3. **狀態機 plate 內循環**：含 Respin 的 RoundInfo 在內部循環播完所有 plate（繞過 ROUND_END），只在 plate 用盡時進一次 ROUND_END（= RoundInfo 級，ReqRoundEnd 一次）。\\n4. **Respin 接通新協議**：鎖定改讀 server `PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos` 累加 + CheckState 優先序重排 + LeaveRespinState 補 ENTER_FREE 出口 + 刪死碼。\\n5. **支援連鎖 Respin 與「MG 局 Respin 完才進 FG」**：現有流程兩者都走錯（v1 對抗審查對碼證實）。\\n\\n### 1.1 範圍邊界（need given，不可越）\\n\\n不動 proto、不動 FeatureWheel 演出本體、不動 EnterFreeState/LeaveFreeState 演出、不順手清無關死碼。FeatureWheel→Respin 正式接線（誰消費 WheelFeatures）目前不存在（🟢A grep WheelFeatures=2 hits 無流程消費者），**不在本次範圍**——本重構讓 client 具備消化「server 多 plate 回包」的能力。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 骨架：狀態機流程（v2 核心）\\n\\n### 2.1 一手生命週期（既有，🟢A 已驗證）\\n\\n```\\nSPIN(plate) → EFFECT_START → SCATTER_SHOW → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → COMMON_SHOW → CHECK_STATE → {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 ROUND_END）────────────┐\\n                    ↓                                                          │\\nSPIN(plate k) → … → CHECK_STATE                                               │\\n                    ├ ① IsGoingToRespinGame（還有 plate, sub<len-1）           │\\n                    │     → ENTER_RESPIN（首手:設旗標+鎖col0/5+宣告; 累加鎖定）→ SPIN(plate k+1) ┘\\n                    ├ ② IsRespinGame（plate 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 設計前提與證據分級\\n\\n### 3.1 協議前提\\n\\n| ID | 內容 | 證據級 |\\n|----|------|--------|\\n| P-1 | RoundQueue[0]=MainGame；`RoundQueue.length>1 ⟺ 觸發 FreeGame` | 🔴 用戶口頭，待對拍 |\\n| P-2 | `PlateQueue.length>1 ⟺ 該局觸發 Respin`（若且唯若）；[0]=正常 spin、[1..]=Respin；可連鎖 | 🔴 用戶口頭 + proto參數說明「PlateQueue=本 round 的盤面流程佇列（初始盤面、respin 後盤面等）」🟡B 佐證 |\\n| P-3 | 標註不擋進度，但**不得在規格裡把「NextFeverGameType 恆 0/1」當 🟢A 事實**。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 實作前驗證點（v1 兩個 BLOCKER 已降級）+ 前置步驟\\n\\n### 前置步驟（第一個 commit 之前）\\n\\n1. **commit 現有 working tree**：git status 8 檔 M + 2 未追蹤 png，先 commit 切分基線（用戶授權偏好：等用戶明確指示才 commit）。\\n2. **pin TypeScript 5.4.5**：記錄錯誤基線（cc.d.ts 噪音 + EnterRespinState TS2339×4）。完成閘門措辭 = 「**相對基線無新增錯誤且 TS2339×4 消失**」，非「tsc 通過」（A-13 通過不可達）。\\n\\n### 驗證點 V-1（原 BLOCKER-1，已由骨架解除）\\n\\nplate 循環繞過 ROUND_END ⇒ ReqRoundEnd 仍每 RoundInfo 一次。**剩餘待驗證**（B-3）：framework `roundController` 在「ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN 未經 ROUND_END/未送 ReqRoundEnd」時是否放行下一次 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加（§5.10）。**剩餘待對拍**：`RoundWin == Σ PlateQueue[].Win` 精確相等（落實公式見 §5.10）。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 模組與職責\\n\\n### 5.1 【新增】assets/Script/Respin/RespinPlateLogic.ts（全案唯一新檔，零 cc 依賴純函式）\\n\\n> 為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(round: number, roundQueueLen: number, isFreeGame: boolean): boolean\\n/** IsGoingToRespinGame 投影：sub < plateCount-1（plateCount≤0/缺值恆 false） */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 `warnings`（呼叫端 console.warn），跳過該筆，**不 throw 不靜默**。\\n- v1 的 `ScanRespinLockedPositions`（掃 Cash/Mystery）**移除**——位置改由 server 給定（§0）。\\n- 對應測試：`tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts`，遵循 A-14 ts-node 慣例。\\n\\n### 5.2 【修改】GameView.ts\\n\\n1. **旗標 getter 化**（刪 m_isGoingToFree/m_isGoingToRespinGame 欄位與 setter，:494-519）：\\n   ```ts\\n   public get IsGoingToFree(): boolean {\\n       return IsGoingToRespinPure(this.m_curSubPlateIndex, this.RoundInfo?.PlateQueue?.length ?? 0);\\n   }\\n   ```\\n   空資料回 false 屬正常閒置語意。\\n2. **CurSubPlateIndex**：`private m_curSubPlateIndex = 0`，public <observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Real Server Data Contradicts RespinLockedPos Protocol Assumption</title>
  <subtitle>respin_and_freegame.json proves RespinLockedPos includes col 0/5, upgrading P-3 specification from user-verbal to concrete evidence</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>P-3 specification updated to reflect RespinLockedPos contains col 0/5 columns, not just col 1-4 as previously assumed</fact>
    <fact>Real server response respin_and_freegame.json Round0 sub0 contains serverPos [0,1,2,3,...,20,21,22,23] where 0-3=col0 and 20-23=col5</fact>
    <fact>Evidence level upgraded from 🔴 (user verbal + proto description) to 🟢A (actual server response decoded)</fact>
    <fact>Section 5.5 line 233 still states "col 0/5 不在 server serverPos（P-3，只給 col1-4）" creating documentation inconsistency</fact>
    <fact>Original assumption based on P-4 specification that col 0/5 are locked for entire Respin round via Game_Define.RespinLockColumns=[0,5]</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session discovered a critical protocol specification error by examining real server data from respin_and_freegame.json. The P-3 specification previously stated RespinLockedPos only contains col 1-4 positions (incremental locked positions), based on user verbal confirmation and proto parameter descriptions. However, decoding the actual server response reveals serverPos includes positions 0-3 (col 0) and 20-23 (col 5), proving the server does send col 0/5 locked positions in RespinLockedPos. This finding was documented in P1-design-spec.md with strikethrough on the incorrect assumption and concrete evidence citation. The discovery creates an inconsistency with section 5.5 which still references the old P-3 assumption, requiring further documentation updates. This exemplifies evidence-based design iteration where real data overrides verbal specifications.</narrative>

entries；col/row 由注入 decodePos 解碼。\\n- **BC-4 [tsc+grep]** 死碼歸零：grep `FreePlateSymbol|MainPlateSymbol`=0；grep `IsGoingToFree\\\\s*=`/`IsGoingToRespinGame\\\\s*=`（getter 定義除外）=0；grep `CurrFeverGameType grep WheelFeatures=2 hits 無流程消費者），**不在本次範圍**——本重構讓 client 具備消化「server 多 plate 回包」的能力。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 骨架：狀態機流程（v2 核心）\\n\\n### 2.1 一手生命週期（既有，🟢A 已驗證）\\n\\n```\\nSPIN(plate) → EFFECT_START → SCATTER_SHOW → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → COMMON_SHOW → CHECK_STATE → {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 ROUND_END）────────────┐\\n                    ↓                                                          │\\nSPIN(plate k) → … → CHECK_STATE                                               │\\n                    ├ ① IsGoingToRespinGame（還有 plate, sub<len-1）           │\\n                    │     → ENTER_RESPIN（首手:設旗標+鎖col0/5+宣告; 累加鎖定）→ SPIN(plate k+1) ┘\\n                    ├ ② IsRespinGame（plate 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(round: number, roundQueueLen: number, isFreeGame: boolean): boolean\\n/** IsGoingToRespinGame 投影：sub < plateCount-1（plateCount≤0/缺值恆 false） */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 `warnings`（呼叫端 console.warn），跳過該筆，**不 throw 不靜默**。\\n- v1 的 `ScanRespinLockedPositions`（掃 Cash/Mystery）**移除**——位置改由 server 給定（§0）。\\n- 對應測試：`tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts`，遵循 A-14 ts-node content.thinking:
The primary session is continuing to update the P1-design-spec.md document with findings from the real server data. They updated section 5.5 to reflect that col 0/5 are actually included in the server's RespinLockedPos data (contrary to the previous assumption), and now they're proposing a solution: merge col 0/5 into m_respinLockedSet but skip them during static sprite rendering to avoid double-rendering issues with SetColumnLock.

This is a design decision update based on real data discovery. The key insight is:
1. Real server data shows col 0/5 ARE in RespinLockedPos
2. This contradicts P-3's original assumption 
3. The solution is to merge everything into the set, but have EnterRespinState skip col 0/5 when creating static sprites
4. SetColumnLock still handles the reel locking behavior for col 0/5

This is an important architectural decision that reconciles the real server behavior with the client-side rendering logic.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>decision</type>
  <title>Column 0/5 Rendering Strategy for Respin Locked Positions</title>
  <subtitle>Architectural decision to merge all serverPos including col 0/5 into m_respinLockedSet but exclude col 0/5 from static sprite rendering to avoid double-rendering with SetColumnLock</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Section 5.5 updated with rendering strategy after discovering col 0/5 are included in server RespinLockedPos</fact>
    <fact>Decision to merge col 0/5 positions into m_respinLockedSet without filtering at data layer</fact>
    <fact>EnterRespinState will use EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC flag to skip col 0/5 during static sprite creation</fact>
    <fact>SetColumnLock maintains responsibility for col 0/5 reel locking and original symbol preservation</fact>
    <fact>Separation of concerns: data layer keeps all positions, rendering layer filters to avoid double-rendering</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session made an architectural decision documented in P1-design-spec.md section 5.5 to address the discovered protocol discrepancy. After real server data (respin_and_freegame.json) revealed that RespinLockedPos includes col 0/5 positions—contradicting the original P-3 assumption—the team decided on a layered approach: merge all serverPos values (including col 0/5) into m_respinLockedSet for data completeness, but introduce an EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC flag in EnterRespinState to skip col 0/5 during static sprite rendering. This prevents double-rendering conflicts since SetColumnLock already handles col 0/5 by locking the reels and preserving original symbols. The decision maintains single source of truth in the data layer while adding filtering logic at the presentation layer, avoiding the need to filter incoming protocol data based on client-side rendering concerns.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>trade-off</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

content.thinking:
This is very revealing! There are only 2 call sites in the project:

1. RoundEndState.ts:90 checks `!roundController.CanToNextRound()` - this is used as a gate in RoundEndState
2. SpinState.ts:27 calls `roundController.StartSpin()` - this is called at the beginning of spin state

The fact that CanToNextRound is only called from RoundEndState is very significant for V-1 validation. If the gate is only checked in RoundEndState, and the new flow has ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN bypassing ROUND_END, then the CanToNextRound gate won't be encountered during plate-level loops!

This means V-1 is likely already satisfied - the framework won't block the plate loops because the gate is in ROUND_END which is being bypassed.

The Astarte.RoundController implementation is in System/index.ts, but the grep didn't find class definitions there.

Line 69: `this.m_gameView.RetryRoundEnd();` - calls the ReqRoundEnd mechanism
Line 90: `|| !roundController.CanToNextRound()` - this is the gate condition

The gate is at RoundEndState, and the condition is:
```
if ( this.m_processTick > 0
    || !roundController.CanToNextRound()
    || ( commonGameManager.IsTwice && !commonGameManager.IsGetRoundEndAck ) )
{
    return;
}
```

So the gate blocks progression from RoundEndState until:
1. processTick countdown finishes
2. roundController.CanToNextRound() returns true
3. If IsTwice mode, wait for RoundEndAck

This confirms that:
- The gate is ONLY at RoundEndState
- SpinState doesn't check this gate (as we saw earlier)
- The plate-level loop ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN bypasses RoundEndState entirely, so never hits this gate
- V-1 is validated: the framework allows multiple spins within a round without going through ROUND_END

The design's plate loop (ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN) works because it never enters ROUND_END until all plates are exhausted, at which point it enters ROUND_END once and the gate applies at the RoundInfo level, not plate level.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>CanToNextRound Gate Confirms RoundInfo-Level Gating - V-1 Fully Validated</title>
  <subtitle>RoundEndState.ts line 90 shows CanToNextRound gate only blocks progression from ROUND_END, not between consecutive spins within a round</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>RetryRoundEnd() called at RoundEndState.ts line 69, invoking ReqRoundEnd mechanism</fact>
    <fact>CanToNextRound() gate at line 90 blocks progression FROM RoundEndState until framework allows</fact>
    <fact>Gate guards RoundEndState exit, combined with processTick countdown and IsTwice mode RoundEndAck wait</fact>
    <fact>Plate-level loop ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN completely bypasses RoundEndState and thus never encounters CanToNextRound gate</fact>
    <fact>V-1 validation point definitively satisfied: framework gates operate at RoundInfo level, not plate level</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session completed V-1 validation by examining RoundEndState.ts line 90, where the CanToNextRound() gate actually blocks execution. The gate is part of a compound condition that prevents RoundEndState from progressing until: (1) processTick countdown completes, (2) roundController.CanToNextRound() returns true, and (3) if in IsTwice mode, RoundEndAck is received. Critically, this gate only blocks progression FROM RoundEndState—it does not block SpinState entry or prevent consecutive spins within a round. Since the design's plate-level loop follows ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN and bypasses ROUND_END entirely until all plates are exhausted, the CanToNextRound gate never fires during Respin continuation hands. It only applies once per RoundInfo when finally entering ROUND_END after the last plate. This architectural discovery definitively validates V-1: the framework's round control gates operate at the RoundInfo granularity, not plate granularity, making the ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN loop pattern fully compatible with framework constraints.</narrative>

content.thinking:
The user is observing the primary session reading GameView.ts lines 878-897, focusing on the RetryRoundEnd() method. This is examining how ReqRoundEnd is called with CurPlateIndex + 1 and the isEnd boolean calculation. This is relevant to the V-1 validation context - they're verifying that ReqRoundEnd is called once per RoundInfo with the correct round index.

The key observation here is:
- Line 890: commonGameManager.ReqRoundEnd() call
- Line 891: First parameter is CurPlateIndex + 1 (the round index being ended)
- Line 892: Second parameter isEnd is true when CurPlateIndex >= RoundQueue.length - 1 OR CurPlateIndex === -1

This is checking whether the current round is the last round. The logic shows that:
- isEnd is true when on the last round (CurPlateIndex >= length - 1)
- OR when CurPlateIndex is -1 (idle/reset state)

This is part of understanding how the v2 design's "plate loops bypass ROUND_END" pattern means ReqRoundEnd is only called once per RoundInfo, not once per plate. The design spec mentioned that RetryRoundEnd logic doesn't need changes because it's already at RoundInfo granularity.

I should document this as a discovery showing the ReqRoundEnd call structure supports the V-1 validation.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>RetryRoundEnd Operates at RoundInfo Granularity - V-1 Architecture Confirmed</title>
  <subtitle>GameView RetryRoundEnd() passes CurPlateIndex+1 to ReqRoundEnd with isEnd flag based on RoundQueue length, not PlateQueue, confirming round-level not plate-level signaling</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>RetryRoundEnd() defined at GameView.ts line 888, called from RoundEndState.OnEnter line 69</fact>
    <fact>ReqRoundEnd first parameter is CurPlateIndex + 1, representing the round number (RoundInfo index)</fact>
    <fact>isEnd flag calculated as CurPlateIndex >= RoundQueue.length - 1, checking if last RoundInfo not last plate</fact>
    <fact>Parameters use CurPlateIndex (RoundInfo-level cursor) not CurSubPlateIndex (plate-level cursor)</fact>
    <fact>Design spec section 5.2-7 notes RetryRoundEnd needs no changes because plate loops bypass ROUND_END</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session examined GameView.RetryRoundEnd() to verify it operates at RoundInfo granularity, not plate granularity. Lines 890-893 show ReqRoundEnd receives CurPlateIndex + 1 as the round number and calculates isEnd by comparing CurPlateIndex to RoundQueue.length - 1, not PlateQueue.length. This confirms the round-end signaling mechanism already operates at the RoundInfo level. In the v2 design where plate loops follow ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN bypassing ROUND_END, this method is only invoked once after all plates in a RoundInfo are exhausted, sending ReqRoundEnd with the correct round index and isEnd flag. The architecture shows ReqRoundEnd was always intended as a RoundInfo-level signal, never plate-level, which naturally supports the new Respin flow. This discovery completes the V-1 validation chain: framework gates operate at RoundInfo level, SpinState allows consecutive spins, and RetryRoundEnd signals round completion not plate completion.</narrative>

3. Line 38: AssertLockedConsistency() call for fail-loud validation
4. Line 41: ClearRespinLocks() to clear the accumulated locked set
5. Lines 44-59: Three-way routing logic matching design spec section 5.6:
   - IsGoingToFree → ENTER_FREE (the F-1 fix for MG Respin → FreeGame)
   - IsFreeGame && last round → LEAVE_FREE
   - else → ROUND_END
6. Lines 64-89: AssertLockedConsistency() implementation with fail-loud console.error

This matches P1-design-spec.md section 5.6 exactly. The implementation includes:
- The F-1 fix (ENTER_FREE branch that was missing in original)
- The fail-loud assertion for protocol validation
- The inline routing that doesn't return to CheckState
- Comments explaining the architectural decisions

This is another major piece of the v2 implementation already in place.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>LeaveRespinState Implements V2 Exit Logic with F-1 Fix</title>
  <subtitle>LeaveRespinState.ts contains completed v2 implementation including ENTER_FREE routing fix, fail-loud assertions, and accumulated lock cleanup</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>LeaveRespinState.ts clears IsRespinGame flag at line 30 and unlocks columns 0/5 at lines 32-35</fact>
    <fact>AssertLockedConsistency() method at lines 64-89 validates accumulated locks match server RespinLockedPos union via fail-loud console.error</fact>
    <fact>ClearRespinLocks() called at line 41 to remove accumulated locked position set</fact>
    <fact>Three-way routing at lines 44-59: IsGoingToFree→ENTER_FREE, IsFreeGame last round→LEAVE_FREE, else→ROUND_END</fact>
    <fact>IsGoingToFree→ENTER_FREE branch at lines 45-48 implements F-1 fix for "MG Respin完才進FG" flagship scenario</fact>
    <fact>Comments at line 43 explicitly reference "F-1 修復" and note control doesn't return to CheckState</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session examined LeaveRespinState.ts and discovered the v2 implementation is complete, matching P1-design-spec.md section 5.6 precisely. The state clears the IsRespinGame flag, unlocks columns 0/5, runs a fail-loud consistency assertion comparing accumulated locks against the server's RespinLockedPos union, clears the lock set, then routes to next state. Critically, it includes the F-1 fix: the IsGoingToFree→ENTER_FREE branch (lines 45-48) that was missing in the original implementation, enabling the "MainGame Respin完才進FreeGame" flagship scenario described in the design spec. The AssertLockedConsistency() method implements the BC-6 validation contract, using console.error for protocol deviations without crashing the state machine. The inline comment at line 43 confirms this routing doesn't return control to CheckState but dispatches directly, matching the design's trade-off #2 (duplicated if-else between LeaveRespinState and CheckState for zero framework risk).</narrative>

content.thinking:
The primary session just created a Python simulation script to validate the BC-5 behavioral contract from the design specification. This script simulates the v2 state machine flow using the real server data from respin_and_freegame.json. 

This is significant work - it's creating a validation tool that:
1. Loads the real server data
2. Simulates the dual-layer cursor advancement (AdvancePlateCursor)
3. Implements the 5-branch CheckState priority logic
4. Tracks Respin entry/exit, lock accumulation, and assertions
5. Validates the state transition sequence matches BC-5 scenarios

This is a "feature" type observation - a new testing/validation capability was added.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>BC-5 State Machine Simulation Script Created</title>
  <subtitle>Python simulator validates v2 state transitions against real server data, tracking ENTER_RESPIN counts, lock accumulation, and routing correctness</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>.claude_temp/bc5_sim.py created to simulate v2 state machine flow using respin_and_freegame.json server data</fact>
    <fact>Simulator implements dual-layer cursor advancement with advance(round, sub, plateCount) returning (round, sub+1) or (round+1, 0)</fact>
    <fact>Five-branch CheckState priority logic implemented matching design spec: IsGoingToRespin, IsRespinGame, IsGoingToFree, IsFree last round, ROUND_END</fact>
    <fact>ENTER_RESPIN tracks first-hand vs continuation, merges RespinLockedPos into accumulated set, counts total invocations</fact>
    <fact>LEAVE_RESPIN validates merged set equals server RespinLockedPos union via assertion, routes to ENTER_FREE/LEAVE_FREE/ROUND_END</fact>
    <fact>Simulator outputs trace of state transitions with cursor positions, plate counts, win values, and final statistics</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session created bc5_sim.py to validate behavioral contract BC-5 from P1-design-spec.md, which requires specific state transition sequences for scenarios ① (MG plates=3, RoundQueue.length=2), ② (chained plates=3), and ③ (no Respin/FG baseline). The Python script loads the 14-round server data from respin_and_freegame.json, extracts PlateQueue lengths, RespinLockedPos arrays, and Win values per plate, then simulates the v2 state machine: starting from (-1,0), advancing cursor through SPIN→CHECK loops, applying the 5-branch priority logic, tracking isRespin/isFree flags, accumulating locks in ENTER_RESPIN, validating consistency in LEAVE_RESPIN, and counting ENTER_RESPIN and ROUND_END invocations. The trace output shows each state transition with context (cursor position, plate count, win value), enabling verification that ENTER_RESPIN fires exactly once per continuation hand, ROUND_END appears only after plates exhausted, and the flagship scenario (LEAVE_RESPIN→ENTER_FREE) routes correctly. This simulation tool provides concrete validation evidence for the state machine design before runtime testing.</narrative>

    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

  </files_read>

    <file>.claude_temp/bc5_sim.py</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
This is a significant validation of the BC-5 behavioral contract. Let me analyze what the simulation output shows:

1. **Round 0 (MG)**: plates=2, ENTER_RESPIN once (first hand), then LEAVE_RESPIN → ENTER_FREE (the F-1 fix working!)
2. **Round 1-13 (FG)**: Multiple rounds with varying plate counts (3, 1, 4, 4, 3, 3, 4, 3, 1, 1, 4, 2, 2)
3. **ENTER_RESPIN invocations**: 23 total (matching the sum of continuation hands across all multi-plate rounds)
4. **ROUND_END invocations**: 12 total (once per RoundInfo after plates exhausted)
5. **Lock accumulation**: All assertions pass (累積 == 聯集) at every LEAVE_RESPIN
6. **Final round**: Round 13 LEAVE_RESPIN → LEAVE_FREE (LR(2) branch for last FG round)

This validates:
- BC-5 scenario ①: The flagship "MG Respin完才進FG" works (Round 0 LEAVE_RESPIN → ENTER_FREE)
- Plate-level loops work correctly (ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN bypassing ROUND_END during plates)
- ROUND_END happens exactly once per RoundInfo (12 rounds, 12 ROUND_END calls, not 23+14=37)
- Lock accumulation is correct (all assertions OK)
- The state machine handles all 14 rounds correctly with mixed plate counts

This is a critical validation of the v2 design.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>BC-5 Simulation Validates V2 State Machine Against Real Server Data</title>
  <subtitle>14-round simulation confirms flagship MG→Respin→FG flow, plate loops bypass ROUND_END, 23 ENTER_RESPIN vs 12 ROUND_END calls, all lock assertions pass</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Round 0 demonstrates flagship scenario: 2 plates, ENTER_RESPIN once, LEAVE_RESPIN→ENTER_FREE (F-1 fix working)</fact>
    <fact>23 ENTER_RESPIN invocations across 14 rounds match continuation hand count (sum of plates-1 for multi-plate rounds)</fact>
    <fact>12 ROUND_END invocations match 12 RoundInfo transitions (14 rounds - 2 handled by ENTER_FREE/LEAVE_FREE)</fact>
    <fact>All LEAVE_RESPIN lock assertions pass: 累積==聯集 for every round (OK status, not X不一致)</fact>
    <fact>Round 13 final FG round routes LEAVE_RESPIN→LEAVE_FREE via LR(2) branch correctly</fact>
    <fact>Plate counts vary: [2,3,1,4,4,3,3,4,3,1,1,4,2,2] demonstrating chained Respin (4 plates = 3 continuations)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session executed bc5_sim.py and obtained comprehensive validation of BC-5 behavioral contract against the 14-round real server dataset. The simulation trace confirms the v2 state machine design works correctly: (1) Round 0 executes the flagship "MainGame Respin完才進FreeGame" scenario, with LEAVE_RESPIN routing to ENTER_FREE instead of getting stuck—validating the F-1 fix. (2) ENTER_RESPIN fires exactly once per continuation hand (23 times across all rounds, not once per plate which would be 37 times), proving the plate-level loop correctly identifies IsGoingToRespin=true for sub<plateCount-1. (3) ROUND_END invokes exactly 12 times (once per RoundInfo after plates exhausted), not during plate continuation, validating the core v2 architecture that bypasses ROUND_END during Respin. (4) All lock accumulation assertions pass with OK status, proving the incremental merge logic matches server RespinLockedPos union semantics. (5) The final round correctly routes LEAVE_RESPIN→LEAVE_FREE via the LR(2) branch. This simulation provides concrete evidence the v2 state machine handles complex scenarios (chained Respin up to 4 plates, mixed single/multi-plate rounds, MainGame→FreeGame transition) correctly before runtime implementation.</narrative>
